chapter_1.action: [Scene: Galaxy - Stage]

Kasumi: It's such a shame to see fun times like these end so fast... But the fact that we got to see your sparkling faces makes it all worthwhile! O-Tae, Arisa, Rimi-rin, Saya! I'm so glad I'm in Poppin'Party with all of you!

LOCK: (Everything's sparkling... I'm having so much fun...) I... I really do love you, Poppin'Party~...! ... Ah! I got lost in my memories of Poppin'Party's concert again! This happens every time I hear their songs... What time is it...? ... Oh no! It's that late already?! I need to get to school! Let's see, my keys are right here... As for my bag... Okay, got it. What else do I need to bring...? My guitar... Sigh~... I wish... I was in a band.
[Scene: Haneoka Girls' Academy - Class 1A]
LOCK: ... And then, Poppin'Party came back on stage again! Oh~, Poppin'Party really outdid themselves with that show. It was incredible...
Asuka: Not this story again. Are you forgetting I was there too?
Ako: Yeah, and I was on that very stage~.
LOCK: I know, but just thinking about it makes me want to talk about it over and over again. That's the power of Poppin'Party.
Ako: I thought they were amazing too! Planning a show like that is hard work! That concert was just bursting with Poppin'Party goodness, and it was fun to see everyone together!
LOCK: Yes! Being able to enter Poppin'Party's huddle is one of my favorite memories from that day.
Asuka: You've told us that already too. Didn't Poppin'Party invite you to join their band multiple times now? If you like them so much, why don't you join them?
LOCK: I-I couldn't possibly! Those five members are what make Poppin'Party what it is! Joining Poppin'Party is out of the question!
Ako: I think you should join them too! You're super good at the guitar. Why not give it a shot? You could make your debut in the band like, bang!
LOCK: No, no, absolutely not! Ever since I saw them play at SPACE's last show, Poppin'Party has been my ideal band.
Asuka: You want to play in a band though, right? You've been saying so since spring.
LOCK: A band... Of course I want to join one... I want to play music, and I don't want to quit... But...
[Scene: CHU²'s Penthouse - Studio]
PAREO: Thank you very much for today. Please be careful on your way home.
LAYER: I thought they were pretty good. They've got the skills for sure.
MASKING: Huh? You sayin' we should compromise?
LAYER: I never said that.
PAREO: They certainly were good at following along with us!
CHU²: At what point? RAISE A SUILEN is the strongest band in the world. Do we want some half-hearted guitarist? Certainly not.
CHU²: The band I produce has to be melodic and impeccable!
CHU²: RAISE A SUILEN is going to go beyond this girls band trend! We're going to change the world! I refuse to settle in any way.
LAYER: So are we always going to perform using fake guitar effects instead of the real thing?
CHU²: Absolutely not. However, I need to find a guitarist who will play for me and only me. Without that, I'll never crush Roselia.
LAYER: ... I've been meaning to ask, but what do you mean by that? You're not planning anything dangerous, are you?
CHU²: Certainly not! I'm just trying to make a point.
LAYER: So what's the plan?
CHU²: We're going to find the perfect stage.
CHU²: So until we find the best guitarist there is, we'll keep holding auditions. You guys just need to focus on your lessons.
CHU²: PAREO!
PAREO: Yes, CHU²-sama! I shall bring you some jerky at once!
CHU²: Nix the jerky! Call in the next guitarist post haste!
PAREO: But that was the last one...
CHU²: Really...?

chapter_2.action: [Scene: Galaxy Stage]
LOCK: I'm sorry for being late~. I'll start cleaning the floor right away.
Yoshiko: Ah, Rokka-chan, you've got perfect timing. Could you go hang these posters out front...? They just arrived from the printer.
LOCK: Of course I can... Hm? "Shoot for Your Dreams" ... "BanG Dream! Girls Band Challenge." What is this?
Yoshiko: Oh, you haven't heard yet, have you? Well, do you know how there are a lot of girls bands nowadays? This event is a tournament where those bands will compete for the number one spot.
LOCK: Huh?! The number one spot?!

Yoshiko: Bands can perform at any of the participating live houses, and the crowd can then vote for the bands they like. Afterwards, the bands that take first and second place will compete at the budokan.
LOCK: Th-the budokan?!
Yoshiko: We weren't originally planning something so elaborate, but the former owner of SPACE is acting as the event advisor, and they wanted more from the event.
LOCK: SPACE...
Yoshiko: You went there before they closed, right?
LOCK: I did! Their last concert was so moving!
Yoshiko: You said you decided to come to Tokyo after seeing that show, didn't you? That must have been some show~.
LOCK: It really was! Every single band was amazing, but personally, I thought Poppin'Party was the best!
Yoshiko: You sure do like that band~.
LOCK: I love them! They all get along and enjoy being in a band together. That's what makes them sparkle! Poppin'Party is my ideal band! If only I could join a band like-
Kasumi: Hello~! Excuse me~, is LOCK here~?
LOCK: Ah! Poppin'Party!
Kasumi: We just happened to be passing by, so we brought you a treat~. It's the newest item at Yamabuki Bakery, the Michelle bun!
LOCK: Th-thank you very much!
Kasumi: Hm? What's that poster for? Shoot for... your dreams...?
LOCK: It looks like Galaxy will be holding preliminaries for this competition. The top two bands get to compete at the Budokan!
Kasumi: Whoa~! The Budokan?! Really?!
LOCK: I just heard about it myself. It's incredible, isn't it?
Rimi: Too incredible~.
Kasumi: Should we join?
Tae: Yeah!
Saya: I don't know if we'll make it to the finals, but it sounds like a good goal to aim for.
Tae: Alright, huddle up, everyone.
Kasumi: Come on, Arisa, you too!
Arisa: ... Jeez~.
Kasumi: Alright, let's make it all the way to the Budokan~!
Poppin'Party: Popipa! Pipopa! Popipapa! Pipopa~!
LOCK: (Poppin'Party's joining the Girls Band Challenge...)
Kasumi: Hey... Do you want to enter too, LOCK?
LOCK: Huh? I-I...
Kasumi: Join us as we aim for the Budokan, LOCK!
LOCK: Huh? ... Whaaat?!
Rimi: Your performance during the culture festival was incredible.
Arisa: No kidding. Your fingers moved so fast that I couldn't even see them.
LOCK: I was so focused on playing that I don't really remember. I'm just glad I was able to help...
Saya: The crowd couldn't take their eyes off of your guitar-playing.
Kasumi: You're always welcome to join Poppin'Party~!
LOCK: Th-thank you very much!

chapter_3.action: [Scene: CHU²'s Penthouse - Studio]
CHU²: PAREO! Why can't you find any good guitarists?!
PAREO: My apologies, CHU²-sama~.
LAYER: Don't take it out on PAREO. I've been looking myself, but your criteria require a high level of skill.
CHU²: Sigh~... We're not making any progress. At this point we'll never unearth our next guitarist!
CHU²: If I had known it was going to be this difficult, I would've locked Tae Hanazono down while I still had the chance.
PAREO: But CHU²-sama, were you not moved by Poppin'Party's show?
CHU²: D-don't mention that!
CHU²: We have to find a new guitarist. Otherwise we're stuck with fake guitar effects.
LAYER: (Hana-chan...)
Tae: I talked to Poppin'Party about being your support guitarist.
LAYER: That must mean you can play with us, right?
Tae: Yeah. Thanks for inviting me, LAYER.
LAYER: You can call me Rei. Just like when we were kids. I've been waiting for this day. I finally get to be in a band with you...
Tae: I want to hear your sound, Rei.
LAYER: Any requests?
Tae: That song. ... I need to talk to you all. I want to quit being the support guitarist of RAS.
LAYER: Huh...?
CHU²: Pardon? Why's that, Hanazono?

Tae: I don't have enough strength to play for both bands... RAS creates incredible music. I don't know how you do it. I wanted to play like that, and I figured I could grow as a musician if I played with you all. If I could train in an amazing band like this, then...
CHU²: Training...? Do you think this is some kind of game?!

CHU²: Well, I'll have you know that I'm taking this band seriously! Do you think you can just do whatever you want?! How self-serving do you have to be to quit after only playing with us for a while?!
CHU²: If you're gonna play with us, you need to take it seriously!
CHU²: Go take some time to cool off.
LAYER: Don't listen to CHU². I know you were taking our band seriously, Hana-chan. Your devotion really did show. ... Go back to Poppin'Party.
Tae: Rei... I'm sorry...
MASKING: Here, drink this. It's canned coffee.
LAYER: ...
MASKING: If you're that down in the dumps... How about I bake you a cake?
LAYER: Fufu, thanks, but I'm alright.
MASKING: PAREO's worried about you. She thinks you're out here cryin'.
LAYER: I won't cry. I made a promise to Hana-chan.
CHU²: PAREO! Jerky!
PAREO: Roger that! Coming right up~♪
CHU²: The next video is... Hm? "Mysterious Guitarist Plays at Culture Festival" ... Wait, this is...
PAREO: CHU²-sama! I have brought your jerky! The flavor of today's jerky is-
CHU²: Silence! I'm about to play this video...
CHU²: Hm? This sound...
CHU²: ... Well.
CHU²: I've found her... I've found my guitarist...!

chapter_4.action: LOCK: Sigh~...
Kasumi: Join us as we aim for the Budokan, LOCK!
LOCK: (Poppin'Party is so nice... I really do love them...) (When will I find my own band...?) Sigh~... At this rate, I never will...
PAREO: Good afternoon!
LOCK: Y-yes, welcome...! Huh? Aren't you in RAS...?
PAREO: I am honored to know that you remember me! Allow me to reintroduce myself. I am CHU²-sama's keyboardist maid, PAREO.
LOCK: It's nice to meet you... I'm-
PAREO: Rokka Asahi! Birthday: July seventeenth. Zodiac sign: Cancer. Blood Type: A. You've been living at this bathhouse since spring. You clean the baths in the morning, go to school, and-
LOCK: ...?! U-um! Why do you know all that...?
PAREO: I've done my research, of course♪ I come bearing an invitation, which I hope you will accept.
LOCK: Huh? An invitation...?
PAREO: We wish to show you a brand new stage. Poppin'Party will be there too, so we hope to see you there♪ Now then, if you'll excuse me.
LOCK: What's this invitation for...? A RAS solo concert?
[Scene: Asahi Bathhouse]
Kasumi: Look at all the people~.
Arisa: They've even got original merchandise. They're like a professional band.
Lisa: Oh~, so you guys came too, huh?
Kasumi: Ah, Lisa-san and Yukina-senpai!
Yukina: Was Poppin'Party invited as well?
Kasumi: Huh? You guys were too?!
Lisa: I think she called herself CHU². That girl sure was persistent. She kept talking about there being a new leader in the age of girls bands... So naturally we were curious.
Kasumi: A new leader...
Arisa: In the age of girls bands...?
Tae: Sorry for the wait. I ran into LOCK, so I brought her with me.
Kasumi: Wow~, LOCK's here~!
LOCK: Tae-senpai helped me just as I was getting lost in the crowd. I wasn't sure about coming to this event, but I was invited, so...
Kasumi & Arisa: You too?
Yukina: That girl... What is she thinking...?
[Scene: dub - Lobby]
Kasumi: That RAS show was so cool...!
Lisa: Ahaha... That was way beyond my expectations...
Sayo: The guitar seemed to be an effect, but all the other members were very high-level, so it was hardly noticeable.
Ako: King's drumming was super-duper cool! It was so exciting~!
Saya: Their music felt like it was going to swallow me up...
LOCK: It really was incredible... Masuki-san is the daughter of the owner of Galaxy. She's been attending the private school Shirayuki Academy since she was in kindergarten.
Arisa: Huh?! Shirayuki?! Isn't that a super fancy all-girls' school?!
Kasumi: Ah, check out the stage! CHU² is coming out! It looks like she has something to say...!
[Scene: dub - Stage]
CHU²: Hello, everyone! I have some sweet news for you before the encore!
CHU²: My band, RAISE A SUILEN will be participating in the BanG Dream! Girls Band Challenge!
CHU²: And more importantly... At the Girls Band Challenge, we will take on Roselia...
Yukina: ...?
CHU²: and Poppin'Party...
Kasumi: ...?
CHU²: ... and crush them!
Kasumi & Yukina: ...?!
LOCK: (Eek~! Wh-what's going on...? This is getting out of hand...!)
CHU²: And in order to do that...
CHU²: We want to recruit you as our guitarist, Rokka Asahi!
LOCK: ...!

chapter_5.action: Asuka: Are they still following you...? You know, that RAS band...
LOCK: Yes...
Asuka: They've even followed you all the way to school... They must be pretty desperate.
[Scene: Haneoka Girls' Academy - Class 1A]
CHU²: We want to recruit you as our guitarist, Rokka Asahi!
LOCK: ...! ... Huh? Whaaat?! I... I'm sorry...
Asuka: You turned them down just like that, huh...?
LOCK: I was scared, and it came out of nowhere. What's more, she said they're trying to crush Poppin'Party and Roselia...
[Scene: Downtown]
PAREO: Rokka Asahi is proving to be quite elusive. Shall we try another day?
CHU²: Negative! We've finally found a guitarist worthy of RAISE A SUILEN...
CHU²: You saw the video of her at that culture festival! I knew we needed her sound from the moment I heard it!
CHU²: Her guitar skills are the real deal.
PAREO: CHU²-sama... In that case, let us try over there! We know she has to be here somewhere!
CHU²: We'll find her, and then we'll make her RAISE A SUILEN's guitarist.
Asuka: Phew... You can come out now, Rokka.
LOCK: That was so close~...
Asuka: ... You know, those girls seem to understand how talented you are. They said they saw a video of you at the culture festival.
LOCK: So they saw my performance...
[Scene: Station - Train Platform]
CHU²: PAREO~! Where are you~?! I'm thirsty!
CHU²: All I did was rest for a little bit! Where could she be?!
Yukina: Would you like some milk tea?
CHU²: Urgh?! Yukina Minato...
Yukina: Did you forget your wallet?
CHU²: I-I never carry cash with me... And I'll take a black coffee.
CHU²: S-so bitter...
Yukina: ...
CHU²: To think I'd be treated to coffee by the enemy...
Yukina: The enemy?
CHU²: Yeah, you're the enemy! I'm entering Girls Band Challenge to crush Roselia. You're going to accept my challenge, right?
Yukina: ...
CHU²: That's the entire reason RAS was formed!
Yukina: ... I rejected your offer to produce because Roselia is not a stage for you to perform your own music on.
CHU²: What's wrong with wanting my own music? If I'm going to make the perfect band with impeccable music and members, why should I have to compromise?
Yukina: You... You're very similar.
CHU²: What?
Yukina: Understood. I will consider entering Girls Band Challenge.
CHU²: I look forward to your response. Farewell.
[Scene: Asahi Bathhouse]
LOCK: Phew... I don't think they'd follow me all the wa-
PAREO: Rokka-sama.
LOCK: E-eek!
PAREO: There is no need to be alarmed. CHU²-sama is resting at the moment, so you can relax.
LOCK: I-I see...
PAREO: Do you not have any interest in bands?
LOCK: Huh...? That's not...
PAREO: CHU²-sama desires your talents more than anything. I would also welcome you to our band. Please feel free to stop by whenever you are ready.
LOCK: ...
PAREO: Now then, if you'll excuse me.

chapter_6.action: [Scene: Galaxy Entrance - Staircase]
MASKING: Argh~, it's so cold~. Ridin' around on a motorcycle this time of year sucks.
Yoshiko: Ah, Masuki-chan, welcome home~. Be careful with that bike.
MASKING: Is that one chick here? You know, the one with glasses.
Yoshiko: Rokka-chan? She was cleaning the floor up until a second ago... Maybe she's on the stage.
MASKING: The stage? ... Hm? I can hear somethin' comin' from inside... Is she... playin' guitar...?
[Scene: Galaxy - Stage]
LOCK: Sigh~...
PAREO: Do you not have any interest in bands?
LOCK: I... (I want bandmates who I need to be in a band with. People I can't see myself without...) (Those are the kind of people I want to be in a band with!)
MASKING: Hey.
LOCK: Ah, Masuki-san! I didn't see you there. Are you here to practice?
MASKING: You're comin' with me.
LOCK: Huh?! Wh-what's going on?! Don't pull on me like that!
MASKING: They need to hear your "R・I・O・T."
LOCK: Wh-who are you talking about...?!
MASKING: Come on, put this helmet on. We're goin'.
LOCK: G-going where?! Eek~!
[Scene: CHU²'s Penthouse - Studio]
PAREO: Oh, if it isn't Massu-san. Didn't you already leave before?
MASKING: Hey, PAREO. I brought her.
LOCK: ...?!
PAREO: Rokka-sama! Welcome!
LOCK: Wh-where am I...?!
PAREO: This is CHU²-sama's private studio.
LOCK: Eek~!
LAYER: Are you alright?
MASKING: Calm down. It's not like we're gonna eat you.
CHU²: Well, well, well~... So you've finally shown your face, Rokka Asahi. Are you ready to join us?
LOCK: N-no! Masuki-san brought me here against my will...!
MASKING: You sure about that? Maybe you should listen to your own music. Sounds don't lie. Come on, we're doin' a session together.
LOCK: A-a session?! Eek~!
LAYER: Staying in that corner is going to make playing difficult, you know. Come over here.
LOCK: O-okay, then I'll stand beside you...
LAYER: What song are we playing?
MASKING: R・I・O・T. That girl managed to play our song after only hearin' it once. That's fine by you, right?
LOCK: Y-yes... That's fine.
CHU²: Then feel free to get wild.

LOCK: ...! (Th-this is amazing... I can feel their sound crashing over my body...) (This is the music of RAS... Playing their songs really shows you how incredible they are...) (I must... I need to match them...!)
CHU²: ...
LOCK: Huff... Puff... (I-it's been so long since I played music with others... It felt so... good...!)
LAYER: She did well, don't you think? She's really easy to play with.
PAREO: Agreed! That was very good!
MASKING: Hmmm... Somethin' ain't right...
LOCK: ... Huh?
MASKING: When you were playin' at Galaxy, it was... different somehow...
CHU²: Sigh...
LOCK: U-um...
CHU²: I don't need a sound that's trying to fit in with everybody else...
CHU²: My condolences... You fail.
LOCK: ...?!

chapter_7.action: [Scene: CiRCLE - Lobby]
Marina: Today's the day~. Thanks to the BanG Dream! Girls Band Challenge, we've got a full house♪ Yoshiko, Rokka-chan, thank you for coming to help out today. I really appreciate it.
Yoshiko: Not at all. You'd do the same for us.
LOCK: The crowd seems a little anxious.
Marina: Their votes are going to decide the rankings, so I'm sure the atmosphere feels different from our usual events.
LOCK: Only the top two bands get to perform at the Budokan, right?
Marina: I wonder who will make it. Afterglow decided to play at a festival downtown instead, but Roselia and Poppin'Party entered, so I can't wait to see what happens~.
Yoshiko: Don't forget about RAS.
LOCK: ...!
CHU²: My condolences... You fail.
LOCK: ... Sigh~.
[Scene: CHU²'s Penthouse - Studio]
CHU²: PAREO! Play the last part of that phrase once more, and be careful! You were late by a tenth of a second!
PAREO: I can't move my fingers anymore~.
CHU²: Shut up!
MASKING: She's even more worked up than usual.
LAYER: That's because the first round of votes are in. Roselia is in first place, while we were second...
MASKING: Why's she so obsessed with Roselia anyway?
CHU²: Why not?! With me as your producer, you could become the strongest band ever! You could change the world!
Yukina: I'm sorry, but my answer remains the same.
CHU²: But why?! You're wasting Roselia's performance skills! I only approached you after seeing how well you perform!
CHU²: I finally found the perfect sound...
Yukina: We are aiming to the top, and we will get there through our own music. We do not need a producer.
CHU²: Why?! Why?! I don't believe this! I'll never forgive you...
CHU²: I'll crush bands like you!
CHU²: What are we missing? Our first performance was perfect! So why...?

LAYER: Hey, CHU²... Are we really going to continue without a guitarist? What happened to that last girl? Rokka-chan, was it? Weren't you the one who reached out to her? You must have thought she was something special.
CHU²: I did, but she didn't meet my expectations. More importantly, you need to focus on your lessons. That last concert was-
LAYER: ... Hm? It's from Hana-chan. Sorry, I'm going to head out.
CHU²: No~! I'm not done talking to you~!
[Scene: Park]
Tae: Here, have a baked sweet potato. They gave me an extra when I bought one in front of the station.
LAYER: Thanks. You always ask to meet on such short notice, Hana-chan.
Tae: Were you busy?
LAYER: No. By the way, Poppin'Party is entering the Girls Band Challenge, right?
Tae: Yep. Our preliminary show at Galaxy is coming up.
LAYER: I see. We might perform together somewhere along the line.
Tae: Yeah...
LAYER: ... Ah... That reminds me. That girl who works part-time at Galaxy visited us the other day.
Tae: Huh? You mean LOCK?
LAYER: It was for an audition for our guitarist... You see...
[Scene: Hanasakigawa Girls' Academy - Student Council Room]
Kasumi: Huh?! She failed?!
Arisa: Huh? What's their problem?! Why'd they make such a big deal out of scouting her then?!
Rimi: So that's what happened... I hope LOCK-chan's okay...
Tae: I think LOCK wants to play with RAS.
Saya: Fixating on every little thing could be holding her back. She must be feeling so helpless.
Tae: I want to cheer up LOCK.
Kasumi: Yeah!
Saya: Ah, in that case, how about we try this?!
Kasumi: Try what?!
Saya: So about that new song we're playing in the preliminaries...

chapter_8.action: Kasumi: It's finally here. Today's our first preliminary show!
Saya: I knew I'd be nervous, but still...
Rimi: Let's just do our best.
Arisa & Tae: Y-yeah! Yeah!
LOCK: Okay, Poppin'Party, good luck out there!
Kasumi: Thanks, LOCK! Make sure you really listen to our new song, got it?!
LOCK: G-got it!
[Scene: Galaxy - Offstage]
Kasumi: Good evening, everybody~! We are~...
Poppin'Party: Poppin'Party!
Kasumi: And we've decided to enter the Girls Band Challenge! We hope you'll all show us your support! Now then, first up is our new song!
Tae: We wrote this song with a very special friend in mind.
Rimi: We hope we can make this friend smile and help her do what she wants to do without a second thought.
LOCK: Huh...?
Kasumi: We hope you'll enjoy...
Poppin'Party: Step×Step!
LOCK: (Poppin'Party... made this song... for me...?! They're performing it on such an important day too...) ... (Do what I want... without a second thought... I...) I want to be in a band!
[Scene: Galaxy - Stage]
LOCK: Please! Give me one more chance...! I want to audition again!
CHU²: Rokka Asahi. I'm sorry, but you don't have what it takes to perform with RAS.
CHU²: PAREO! Show our guest to the exit.
LOCK: ... I'm not goin' nowhere!
CHU²: What?

LOCK: I've wanted to be in a band for a very long time now! I want to perform with people who make me feel something special, just like Poppin'Party. And I felt a little bit of that at my audition... I know it might be too late... But I want to play music with RAS. I want to give it my all and fight! I wanna be in a band with RAS!
CHU²: ...
MASKING: CHU²... Give the girl a chance to prove herself.
CHU²: Fine... However... This is your last chance.
LOCK: ... Hmph. ... Here I go!
[Scene: CHU²'s Penthouse - Studio]
LOCK: (I don't want to leave with any regrets... So...) (I just have to give it my all... and play!)
PAREO: ... Oh, I'm getting goosebumps.
MASKING: This girl... Is she tryin' to take over the bass and keyboard too?
LAYER: She makes me want to sing.
MASKING: ... Jeez.
LOCK: ... ?! (Everyone...?!) Huff... Puff...
LAYER: Rokka-chan, you and your guitar really got carried away.
LOCK: LAYER-san... Masuki-san, PAREO-san...
MASKING: Ain't no way we could just sit back and watch a performance like that. We had to get in on the action.
PAREO: I am beyond satisfied~♪
LOCK: Bands are... are... So amazing!!
MASKING: What'd you think, CHU²?
CHU²: ...
CHU²: Alright, Rokka Asahi... I shall permit your entry into RAS.
LOCK: ...!
CHU²: However...
CHU²: You are only our temporary guitarist!
MASKING: Huh? Why the temporary status?
CHU²: Because she's still not ready. Rokka Asahi, I want you to become a guitarist worthy of RAS!
LOCK: ...!

chapter_9.action: [Scene: Several Days Later]
LOCK: Temporary...? What does that mean...?
CHU²: Rokka Asahi, if you don't wipe that stupid expression off your face, you'll never be more than a temporary member.
CHU²: What's more, here. I got you a new guitar. Use this.
LOCK: But I already have a guitar...
CHU²: I don't want to tamper with the music you play on something so important to you. Use this guitar when you play with RAS.
MASKING: Whoa~, now that's a sweet guitar! You look so cute holdin' it, too.
LOCK: That's not true!
CHU²: More importantly, how's perfecting our new song going? Is it ready for our music video?
LAYER: EXPOSE 'Burn out!!!' is such a great song.
PAREO: Of course it is! Everything from the lyrics to the composition and arrangement is all done by our CHU²-sama!
LOCK: Huh?! Wait, does that include all the different parts? The guitar, bass, drums, keyboard, and the DJ too... You really can do anything.
CHU²: ...
PAREO: Our goal is to capture the hearts of the audience with this music video and get them to come to our shows!
CHU²: I'll decide whether you remain a temporary member based on what happens here today. Alright, now get in the booth.
LOCK: Yes...!
CHU²: No! Stop. Do it again.
LOCK: ...?! (If I want to become a true member of the band, I need to do my best here...)
CHU²: Stop!
LOCK: (Wh-what am I doing wrong...? I should be playing the same way as last time...)
CHU²: Rokka Asahi, do you think this is a solo performance?
LOCK: Huh...?
CHU²: At this rate, you'll remain a temporary member. We're done for today.
[Scene: CHU²'s Penthouse - Studio]
LOCK: Um... I'm sorry for holding you guys back... I tried to play with everything I had like last time...
MASKING: No need to apologize. I know the feelin'.
LOCK: Huh?
